keywords: TEK screws price, self-drilling screws FOB China, hex washer head screws, metal roofing screws, steel frame fasteners

heading.en: Self-Drilling TEK Screws: Types and Applications

body.en:
TEK screws (self-drilling screws) eliminate the need for pre-drilling in metal applications. The integrated drill point cuts through steel up to 12.5mm thick, saving installation time and costs.

TEK 3 (No. 3 drill point): Drills through 1.2mm - 3.0mm steel
TEK 4 (No. 4 drill point): Drills through 3.0mm - 6.0mm steel
TEK 5 (No. 5 drill point): Drills through 4.0mm - 12.5mm steel

TradeGo manufactures TEK screws to DIN 7504 standard, with zinc plating or hot-dip galvanizing for corrosion resistance.

heading.en: Current FOB China TEK Screw Prices

body.en:
FOB Shanghai/Ningbo prices for standard hex washer head TEK screws:

TEK 3 (No. 3 drill point) - Zinc Plated:
- #10 x 1" (4.2 x 25mm): $12-16/100pcs
- #10 x 1-1/2" (4.2 x 38mm): $14-18/100pcs
- #12 x 1" (5.5 x 25mm): $13-17/100pcs
- #12 x 1-1/2" (5.5 x 38mm): $15-19/100pcs

TEK 4 (No. 4 drill point) - Zinc Plated:
- #12 x 1" (5.5 x 25mm): $14-18/100pcs
- #12 x 1-1/2" (5.5 x 38mm): $16-20/100pcs
- #14 x 1-1/2" (6.3 x 38mm): $18-22/100pcs
- #14 x 2" (6.3 x 50mm): $20-24/100pcs

TEK 5 (No. 5 drill point) - Hot-dip Galvanized:
- #14 x 1-1/2" (6.3 x 38mm): $28-35/100pcs
- #14 x 2" (6.3 x 50mm): $32-38/100pcs
- #14 x 2-1/2" (6.3 x 65mm): $36-42/100pcs

Bulk pricing available for orders exceeding 100 boxes (100pcs/box).

Volume discounts for TEK screw orders:

20ft Container (approx 800-1200 boxes): 15-20% discount
40ft Container (approx 1800-2500 boxes): 20-25% discount
Annual Supply Contract: 20-30% discount with commitment

Sample orders of 5-10 boxes available for quality verification before bulk orders.

Contact TradeGo for container-scale pricing and delivery lead times to your destination port.

TradeGo TEK screws conform to DIN 7504 standard:

Drill Point: Precision CNC-ground drill point for clean drilling
Thread: High-low thread design for secure fastening
Head: Hex washer head for secure driver engagement
Material: Carbon steel C1022
Surface Treatment: Electro zinc plated (12-18 microns) or Hot-dip galvanized (45-85 microns)
Standards: DIN 7504, ISO 15480

Applications: Metal roofing, steel purlins, cladding, curtain wall systems, steel frame construction, HVAC installations
